Thanks & Regards

Irtaza Zaidi

entry.title: SAP: Email Functionality in SAP with a Custom Function Module
entry.content:
Overview

SAP provides a robust framework for sending emails, and by leveraging the CL_BCS class, developers can create flexible solutions to manage email communication directly within SAP systems. In this blog post, I'll explain about a custom function module that simplifies email sending, including support for multiple recipients (TO, CC, BCC) and different types of attachments.

Key Features

  • Multi-Recipient Support: Easily add recipients as TO, CC, or BCC.
  • Attachment Handling: Attach multiple files of different types with ease.

Detailed Walkthrough

Function Module: ZFM_SEND_EMAIL

This custom function module ZFM_SEND_EMAIL efficiently manages email sending by utilizing the CL_BCS class. Here's a breakdown of its key components:

Input and Output Parameters

  • Importing Parameters:
    • I_SUBJECT: The subject of the email.
    • IT_CONTENT: Text content for the email body.
    • IT_RECEIPIENTS: List of recipients with types (TO, CC, BCC).
    • IT_ATTACHMENTS (optional): List of attachments with types and subjects.
    • I_SENDER (optional): Custom sender address.
  • Exporting Parameters:
    • BAPIRETURN: Return messages indicating the success or failure of the operation.

Table Types

  • ZTT_UIYT_IUSR: Contains user ID, email address, and send type.

    ZTT_UIYT_IUSR - table type of ZSTR_UIYT_IUSR which has below fields
    USRID 1 Types UNAME CHAR 12 0 0 User Name
    EMAIL 1 Types AD_SMTPADR CHAR 241 0 0 E-Mail Address
    SENDTYPE 1 Types ZSENDTYPE CHAR 2 0 0 Send Type (TO/CC/BC)

  • ZTT_EMAIL_ATTACHMENT: Handles attachment type, subject, and content.

    ZTT_EMAIL_ATTACHMENT - table type of ZSTR_EMAIL_ATTACHMENT which has below fields
    ATTACH_TYPE 1 Types SO_OBJ_TP CHAR 3 0 0 Code for document class
    ATTACH_SUBJECT 1 Types SO_OBJ_DES CHAR 50 0 0 Short description of contents
    ATTACH_XSTRING 1 Types ZXSTRING RAWSTRING 0 0 0 Attachment

Core Logic

  1. Initialization: Prepare the email content and subject.
  2. Recipient Assignment: Fetch email addresses and assign send types (TO, CC, BCC).
  3. Email Content Formatting: Convert plain text or HTML content for the email body.
  4. Document Creation: Utilize CL_DOCUMENT_BCS to create email content and attachments.
  5. Email Sending: Execute the send operation and handle any errors or confirmations.

Error Handling

This function module also provides error handling using BAPI message functions, ensuring that any issues encountered during the email sending process are logged and communicated.

Code snippet:

FUNCTION zfm_send_email.  
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------  
*"*"Local Interface:  
*"  IMPORTING  
*"     REFERENCE(I_SUBJECT) TYPE  SO_OBJ_DES  
*"     REFERENCE(IT_CONTENT) TYPE  SOLI_TAB  
*"     REFERENCE(IT_RECEIPIENTS) TYPE  ZTT_UIYT_IUSR  
*"     REFERENCE(IT_ATTACHMENTS) TYPE  ZTT_EMAIL_ATTACHMENT OPTIONAL  
*"     REFERENCE(I_SENDER) TYPE  RDTX OPTIONAL  
*"  EXPORTING  
*"     REFERENCE(BAPIRETURN) TYPE  BAPIRET2_T  
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------  
  
  DATA: lt_email_content TYPE TABLE OF soli,  
        ls_email_content TYPE soli,  
        lt_receipients TYPE TABLE OF zstr_uiyt_iusr,  
        ls_receipients TYPE zstr_uiyt_iusr.  
  
  FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_receipients> TYPE zstr_uiyt_iusr.  
  
  DATA: lv_email_subject TYPE so_obj_des,  
        lt_message TYPE TABLE OF soli,  
        ls_return  TYPE bapiret2,  
        lv_text    TYPE soli-line,  
        send_email TYPE REF TO cl_bcs,  
        document TYPE REF TO cl_document_bcs,  
        recipient TYPE REF TO if_recipient_bcs,  
        sent_to_all TYPE os_boolean,  
        lv_attach_content_solix TYPE solix_tab,  
        lv_attach_size TYPE so_obj_len.  
  
* Initialization  
  lt_email_content[] = it_content[].  
  lv_email_subject = i_subject.  
  
* Validate recipients  
  IF it_receipients[] IS INITIAL.  
    CLEAR ls_return.  
    ls_return-type = 'E'.  
    ls_return-id = 'ZMSG_DM'.  
    ls_return-number = '001'.  
    CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_MESSAGE_GETDETAIL'  
      EXPORTING  
        id         = ls_return-id  
        number     = ls_return-number  
        language   = sy-langu  
        textformat = 'ASC'  
      IMPORTING  
        message    = ls_return-message.  
    IF sy-subrc = 0.  
      APPEND ls_return TO bapireturn.  
    ENDIF.  
    RETURN.  
  ELSE.  
    lt_receipients[] = it_receipients[].  
  ENDIF.  
  
* Get Email Id for the User Name  
  LOOP AT lt_receipients ASSIGNING <fs_receipients> WHERE email IS INITIAL.  
    SELECT SINGLE b~smtp_addr INTO <fs_receipients>-email  
    FROM usr21 AS a  
    INNER JOIN adr6  AS b  
    ON  a~persnumber  = b~persnumber  
    AND a~addrnumber  = b~addrnumber  
    WHERE a~bname     = <fs_receipients>-usrid  
    AND   b~date_from LE sy-datum.  
  ENDLOOP.  
  
* Get the Content of the Mail  
  APPEND '<body>' TO lt_message.  
  LOOP AT lt_email_content INTO ls_email_content.  
    IF ls_email_content-line IS INITIAL OR ls_email_content-line CS '....'.  
      lv_text = ls_email_content-line.  
      REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '....' IN lv_text WITH ''.  
    ELSE.  
      CONCATENATE '<p>' ls_email_content-line '</p>' INTO lv_text.  
    ENDIF.  
    APPEND lv_text TO lt_message.  
  ENDLOOP.  
  APPEND '</body>' TO lt_message.  
  APPEND '<br>' TO lt_message.  
  
  TRY.  
* Initiate  
      send_email = cl_bcs=>create_persistent( ).  
  
* Create Document  
      document = cl_document_bcs=>create_document(  
          i_type        = 'HTM'  
          i_subject     = lv_email_subject  
          i_text        = lt_message ).  
  
* Add Attachments  
      LOOP AT it_attachments INTO DATA(ls_attachment).  
        IF ls_attachment-attach_type IS NOT INITIAL AND  
           ls_attachment-attach_subject IS NOT INITIAL AND  
           ls_attachment-attach_xstring IS NOT INITIAL.  
          lv_attach_content_solix = cl_document_bcs=>xstring_to_solix( ls_attachment-attach_xstring ).  
          lv_attach_size = xstrlen( ls_attachment-attach_xstring ).  
          document->add_attachment(  
            i_attachment_type    = ls_attachment-attach_type  
            i_attachment_subject = ls_attachment-attach_subject  
            i_attachment_size    = lv_attach_size  
            i_att_content_hex    = lv_attach_content_solix ).  
        ENDIF.  
        CLEAR ls_attachment.  
      ENDLOOP.  
  
* Set Document to the Mail  
      send_email->set_document( document ).  
  
** Optionally Add Sender  
*     IF i_sender IS NOT INITIAL.  
*       send_email->set_sender(  
*         cl_cam_address_bcs=>create_internet_address(  
*           i_address_string = CONV #( i_sender )  
*         ) ).  
*     ENDIF.  
  
* Add Recipients to Mail  
      LOOP AT lt_receipients INTO ls_receipients WHERE email IS NOT INITIAL.  
        recipient = cl_cam_address_bcs=>create_internet_address( ls_receipients-email ).  
        CASE ls_receipients-sendtype.  
          WHEN 'TO'.  
            send_email->add_recipient( i_recipient = recipient ).  
          WHEN 'CC'.  
            send_email->add_recipient( i_recipient = recipient i_copy = 'X' ).  
          WHEN 'BC'.  
            send_email->add_recipient( i_recipient = recipient i_blind_copy = 'X' ).  
          WHEN OTHERS.  
            send_email->add_recipient( i_recipient = recipient ).  
        ENDCASE.  
      ENDLOOP.  
  
* Send Email  
      send_email->set_send_immediately( 'X' ).  
      sent_to_all = send_email->send( i_with_error_screen = 'X' ).  
      IF sent_to_all EQ 'X'.  
        COMMIT WORK AND WAIT.  
        CLEAR ls_return.  
        ls_return-type = 'S'.  
        ls_return-id = 'ZMSG_DM'.  
        ls_return-number = '002'.  
        CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_MESSAGE_GETDETAIL'  
          EXPORTING  
            id         = ls_return-id  
            number     = ls_return-number  
            language   = sy-langu  
            textformat = 'ASC'  
          IMPORTING  
            message    = ls_return-message.  
        IF sy-subrc = 0.  
          APPEND ls_return TO bapireturn.  
        ENDIF.  
      ELSE.  
        ROLLBACK WORK.  
        CLEAR ls_return.  
        ls_return-type = 'E'.  
        ls_return-id = 'ZMSG_DM'.  
        ls_return-number = '003'.  
        CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_MESSAGE_GETDETAIL'  
          EXPORTING  
            id         = ls_return-id  
            number     = ls_return-number  
            language   = sy-langu  
            textformat = 'ASC'  
          IMPORTING  
            message    = ls_return-message.  
        IF sy-subrc = 0.  
          APPEND ls_return TO bapireturn.  
        ENDIF.  
        RETURN.  
      ENDIF.  
  
    CATCH cx_address_bcs.  
    CATCH cx_document_bcs.  
    CATCH cx_send_req_bcs.  
  ENDTRY.  
  
ENDFUNCTION.

Conclusion

By implementing this custom function module, you can significantly enhance your system's email capabilities. This solution ensures that your email communications are efficient and reliable.

Happy coding!

entry.title: Re: Why do we need read entity in RAP ?
entry.content: Helpful link(refer Andre's comments ) https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/how-to-implement-read-quot-deep-structure-quot-in-sap-rap-on-btp/qaq-p/12496553

entry.title: SAP DM Inspection results not getting reflected in SAP ERP
entry.content:
Dear SAP DM Experts,

I am trying to integrate SAP ERP with SAP DM from Advanced Production integration point of view (Where Embedded EWM is connected for warehouse tasks). I have made up to recording my inspection results in SAP DM and waiting those results to get reflected in SAP ERP. But unfortunately no data from my inspections are reflected in ERP.

1. I have checked in Integration message Dashboard where my Inspection Results Recording is successful.

2. I checked in SRT_MONI, SLG1, and WE02 for Idocs as well, but no errors found. 

3. When i check QA32, QE51N and no recording can be found.

Could you please let me know what else can go wrong.

entry.title: Re: AGGREGATION ON CDS VIEW and Filtering data with where clause issue
entry.content:
"join with internal table" - is nothing more but GTT + insert. And you can reach it in custom way if the system version is no allowed.

Firstly, create table for temporary purposes (it could be GTT, but you can create transparent table). In my sample I prepared transparent table (in case system version is not allowing). This database transparent table will be inserted from matnr_werks_itab. (see below).

The structure as on the screentshot. the code is below and here (with all package).

    " via GTT_like technique (if no such object)
    DATA lt_db_table4join TYPE SORTED TABLE OF zmatnr_werks_gtt WITH UNIQUE KEY matnr werks.
    DATA ls_line_like_fae TYPE zmatnr_werks_gtt.
    FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_tab_matnr> TYPE ts_matnr_werks.

    LOOP AT mt_tab_matnr ASSIGNING <fs_tab_matnr>.
      ls_line_like_fae-matnr = <fs_tab_matnr>-matnr.
      ls_line_like_fae-werks = <fs_tab_matnr>-werks.
      INSERT ls_line_like_fae INTO TABLE lt_db_table4join.
    ENDLOOP.

    " clear defore join - or add guid
    DELETE FROM zmatnr_werks_gtt.
    INSERT zmatnr_werks_gtt FROM TABLE lt_db_table4join.
    " no commit in one session


    SELECT z1~matnr, SUM( labst ) AS stock
    FROM zmard AS z1
      JOIN zmatnr_werks_gtt AS z2
    ON z1~matnr EQ z2~matnr
    AND z1~werks EQ z2~werks
  WHERE z1~lgort IN @s_lgort
  GROUP BY z1~matnr
  INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_stock)
  .

    " clear after using
    DELETE FROM zmatnr_werks_gtt.

entry.title: Re: Any object to change prices of shipping costs? (ie a BAPI for VI02)
entry.content: As I cannot find something to "mess" with the shipping conditions, I'm rethinking my options. Maybe someone can lend me a hand, I've found two options up to now: create a condition using anyting (help needed here), to intercept the shipping cost creation and mess with the pricing there (via enhancement or EXIT... any hints there?)

entry.title: Re: How to change Control Account in SAP Business One Dur...
entry.content:
Hi @salah35 ,

Once an invoice is posted, you cannot change the control account assigned to it under the Accounting document's tab.

As a workaround, you can offset this open balance with the new control account via Journal Entry and perform an Internal Reconciliation so that the new G/L will hold the balance, from where you can finally post the payment.

BR,
Felipe

entry.title: How to get 'Report Name' by using the GP program in Report Painter?
entry.content:
I've GP Program names of the report painter. i want to find the 'REPORT NAME', by using the GP Program name (GP program starts with GP*......)

one step i know:-
1)Goto 'SE38'--> put the program name --> in the header part there will be a comment section , in the comments REPORT GROUP is written.
2)Take that report group--> goto table 'T803J' and put report group --> you will get 'LIBRARY'.
3)Take library --> goto table 'T800' and put library --> you will get 'REPORT NAME'.

i followed above step, but for this it requires "REPORT GROUP" which i dont have.

please you know how to get 'REPORT NAME' kindly share it.

Thanks in Advance!

entry.title: Data Proposal for Sales Order Requests - UoM Determination
entry.content:
In SAP S/4HANA, the Unit of Measure (UoM) is a critical aspect of various business processes, including sales orders. When you are using Create Sales Order – Automatic Extraction solution, a very important thing is extracted UoM info from PDF purchase order files and then map it to your system UoM. This blog will introduce the determination strategy in this app for UoM. But before to introduce the strategy itself, let’s first learn more about UoMs.

UoM Formats

A UoM may exist in various formats in your system:

  • SAP Internal code: A language-independent code used internally for various transactions and processes.
  • ISO code: A standardized code defined by the International Organization for Standardization (ISO) and used to ensure consistency and standardization across different systems and countries. You can maintain a description for each ISO code.

Language-dependent code: A language-specific code used for external display (for example, in master data and business documents) of the corresponding internal code. You can maintain a business key, a technical key, and a description for each language.

For example, piece is a UoM. Its internal code is ST, ISO code is PCE (Piece) and language-dependent code in English is PC (Piece).

 

Relationship Between Internal Codes and ISO Codes

SAP provides a mapping between the internal codes and ISO codes for UoMs. This mapping ensures that when data is exchanged between SAP and other systems or when reports are generated, the units of measure are consistent and standardized according to ISO standards.

 

Configuring UoMs

To configure and manage UoMs in your system, you can follow these steps:

  1. Access the configuration activity.

    Open app Manage Your Solution (business role SAP_BR_BPC_EXPERT)

    Filter the Application Area by "Application Platform and Infrastructure" and Sub Application Area by "General Settings". Select “Basic Setting”.

    Choose configuration step 2.Units of measurement.

  2. Check/Define ISO Codes for UoMs.

         Choose ISO Codes.

Check/Define SAP internal codes for UoMs. For each internal code, you can check/define its mappings to other UoM formats.

Choose Units of Measurement.

SAP has defined a list of internal codes. You can also define new ones or adjust existing ones.

For each internal code, you can define language-dependent codes (Commercial and Technical) and a description and assign an ISO code.

You can also set up unit conversion factors.

Only language-dependent codes and related descriptions are displayed in business transactions (for example, product master).

Note: ISO codes are not used in business transactions.

UoM Determination in Sales Order Request

After you upload a file to the Create Sales Orders – Automatic Extraction app, the system performs UoM determination for a sales order request item based on the following data:

  • UoM data returned from the data extraction service

UoM data in your configuration environment

When the system can match the returned UoM data to an SAP internal code, a UoM (displayed in language-dependent code in the sales order request) is successfully proposed for the sales order request item.

The system considers the following UoM configurations during the determination:

  • ISO code and related UoM description

Language-Dependent code (commercial code) and related UoM description

For example, the data extraction service extracts UoM texts from the purchase order and attempts to translate them into ISO codes. For instance, if "Kilogram" is found, the service returns the ISO code "KGM".

Based on the returned data ("Kilogram" and "KGM"), the system initially searches for an internal code that has been assigned to the returned ISO code (that is, "KGM"). If there is a match, the system proposes a UOM for the item. If not, further searches are made based on the language-dependent code (commercial code) and UoM descriptions (including the description for ISO code and that for language-dependent code).

You can also create custom logic for UoM determination. For more information on custom implementations, you can refer to Create Sales Orders – Automatic Extraction (IV): BAdI for Modifying Sales Order Request Data

Related info

You can find series of blogs about this solution in below link.

The Link Collection for Create Sales Orders – Automatic Extraction | SAP Blogs

entry.title: Re: Unlock the Power of SAP HCM GenAI: Discover Use Cases, Pre-requisites, and RBP Requirements
entry.content:
This blog highlights several missing features that would have been available if the Talent Intelligence Hub had been delivered with an (updated) version of the MDF framework. @RinkyKarthik: will this change, or is SAP moving away from the MDF framework architecture?

Some key features already could have been working, if done with MDF 😊:

  • Workflows
  • Alerts and to-dos
  • Granular permission control (e.g., limiting access to TIA attributes or tags)
  • Additional fields
  • Help texts for each field
  • Associations to other objects (e.g., parent/child picklists for attribute selection)
  • Messages (e.g., warnings, information, or blocking errors during changes)
  • Easy integration with other systems via the integration center
  • Joule enablement via Quick Actions

entry.content: Nice! 👏

entry.title: Client wants workflow to park and post the document.
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

User will park the document and another higher level authority after checking the document it will be post. And give the approval. Is this possible in SAP Hana public cloud ? Please help me . how to start this functionalities?

entry.title: Re: Estorno Brazil - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: duplicate question, see https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/estorno-brazil-sap-s-4hana-public-cloud/qaq-p/13603571

entry.title: Re: ASA 17.0.10: Question about calling external web serv...
entry.content:
You need to do multipart for multiple Content-Dispositions and put them within the body parts, you can do it like this:

 

url 'api.endpoint.com'
set 'HTTP(EXCEPTIONS=off; VERSION=1.1)'
type 'HTTPS:POST:multipart/form-data'
header 'Connection:keep-alive \x0AAccept: */* \x0AContent-Type: multipart/form-data; boundary=XXXXboundary'

 

Then in your body you will need to list each of the boundaries for each part such as  

 

'--XXXXboundary\x0D\x0AContent-Disposition: form-data; name="@"; filename="' || @fileName || '"\x0D\x0A\x0D\x0A' || replace(replace(@csvData,',0,',',0.01,'),',.',',0.') || '\x0D\x0A--XXXXboundary--'

 

Hope this gets you going in the right direction.

entry.title: Re: How to group the multiple rental units into different...

As Andre suggested, Object grouping will work more based on your requirement.

BR,

entry.title: Unauthorized Error While Fetching Business Partner Details Using SAP Service Layer
entry.content:
I am facing an issue while fetching business partner details from the SAP Service Layer in a SAP Fiori application (developed using VS Code).

Issue Details:

  1. Session ID Retrieval:
    • I am successfully retrieving the session ID by calling the login API from the Service Layer.
  2. Fetching Business Partner Details:
    • For the GET request to fetch business partner details, I am passing the session ID in the headers as follows:

 

 
{ method: "GET", headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json", "B1SESSION": sessionID, // Session ID fetched from login API }, withCredentials: true, }
  1. Errors Encountered:
    • Initially, I faced CORS issues. After adding the necessary fields in the Service Layer headers, the CORS error was resolved.
    • However, I now receive the following errors for the GET request:
      • Unauthorized
      • Invalid session ID
      • Session ID timed out

Troubleshooting:

  • I verified that the session ID is fetched correctly from the login API and passed in the headers.
  • I ensured the application configuration aligns with the Service Layer requirements.

Request for Help:

  1. Are there any additional headers or configurations required for the B1SESSION token?
  2. How can I ensure the session ID does not timeout during the API calls?

entry.title: Re: Operations Tab in PM Notification
entry.content:
Greetings,

per standard no. On notification you can only have tasks and actions - based on entries from catalogues. You can however have a task list assigned to notification if your notification was generated by a maintenance plan.

This task list (operations) can then be transferred to maintenance order if it was created from the notification.

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Step name already used by another step name in Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to deploy the template from SAP market provides "Return Request Process" for SAP Business One. I tried to get the template serval times and deployed/removed many times.

Now I only have 1 template but when I do test the Automation, I got the errors "Step name XXXX already used by another step.

Please help how to releases old step name due to prior deployed taken it.

Thank you so much,

Best Regards,

Tam

entry.title: Re: How to group the multiple rental units into different...
entry.content: Hi Nayamath, Andre, Thank you so much for the reply. Yes, it is working as expected ...:)

entry.title: Re: Do I Need to Manually Implement UPDATE_ENTITY_LIST in...
entry.content:
The upsert functionality is not yet supported in SAP S/4HANA Cloud public edition. 

It is planned to be supported as of 2502.   

In SAP S/4HANA public edition you can not implement the method UPDATE_ENTITY_LIST of the SAP Gateway V4 framework. 

In SAP S/4HANA private edition it would be possible to have a workaround by developing a second service which is implemented using code based implementation of the SAP Gateway OData V4 framework which has the same signature as your RAP based service and that in the end would use the RAP BO via EML calls.   

That means for using upsert one would have to call a different URL though. 

I am currently working an a sample that I am going to publish in GitHub that exactly shows this feature for private cloud and on prem systems in addition to showing this new feature in RAP in 2502.

Kind regards,

Andre

entry.title: Is SAP DISCLOSURE MANAGEMENT 10.1 stack 1500 compatible with S/4HANA 2023 ?

entry.content:
Hello Onireke,

Based on your explanation, we've tried replicating the scenario with the below mentioned frequency parameters and the system works as expected.

Contract Start-01.08.2024 , Contract End Date-08.11.2024 = Contract for 100 days

Condition Unit price- 91.56 

With best regards,

Nayamath

entry.title: Re: Delta processing inside SAP Datasphere
entry.content:

If the local table "rw_cskt" is not delta enabled then how did you use delta table "rw_cskt_Delta" in  "vw_rw_cskt_delta_test" view ? woudn't it give error of invalid table ?

entry.title: Re: SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content: You can learn more about SAP Digital Manufacturing / ERP integration capabilities at https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/integration-guide/sap-digital-manufacturing-for-execution-integration and all APIs and Services at https://api.sap.com/package/SAPDigitalManufacturingCloud/rest , hope it helps! Br, Manoel

entry.title: Print original Characteristic results in the Quality Certificate from QC20 without round-off
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We have a critical requirement in our process that we want to print original Characteristic Results in the Quality Certificate when we print from QC20 or QC21, without rounding off to decimals in certificate profile.

In case of different decimal points of the same MIC is used in inspection plan (and result recording accordingly) and certificate profile, system generates certificate output with rounding up/down to certificate profile decimal information.


Requirement: We need to print the exact result data, as it is entered during result recording.

Can you please tell if there is standard approach to avoid rounding off according to certificate profile (maybe using a BADi, User Exit, Enhancement Spot etc.)? Instead, we want to show the original result from result recording.

Client does not want to maintain several certificate profiles to handle decimal issue.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Print original Characteristic results in the Quality...
entry.content:
Hi,

please read the F1 help for the affected field in the certificate profile characteristic data view: 'Decimal Places' (QCVMEA-STELLEN, QCVM-STELLEN).

"Number of Places to the Right of a Decimal Point (Accuracy)
Use
For each characteristic in the certificate profile, you can specify the number of decimal places the quantitative values will have when they are printed out on the certificate.
The number of decimal places specified in the characteristic master record will be displayed as a default value.

Procedure
Enter the desired number of decimal places.

Note
If an entry is not made (blanks), it will be interpreted as a zero.
If you do not want to determine the number of decimal places for the output at this stage, enter 98 or 99 in this field. For both values, the number of decimal places will be taken from the current characteristic data. In addition, if you input 98, the decimal places from input processing will be considered for values from inspections.

Example
You have defined a quantitative characteristic but, instead of specifying the number of decimal places in the master inspection characteristic, you specified it in the inspection plan.
If you want to print the certificate with the same number of decimal places as defined in the respective inspections, enter 99 in this field."

For more information on code level, see include LQC02F01, forms:

digits_as_used_when_98
digits_as_used_when_99

Have a nice day,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: How to get 'Report Name' by using the GP program in R...
entry.content: Try FM G_RW_PROGRAM_GET_INFO

entry.title: Re: How to fill item navigation property of standard API...
entry.content:
Hi VB_developer,

your request should look similar like the following that i used to call the Salesorder A2X API:  

    DATA deep_busi_data TYPE tys_a_sales_order_simulation_t.
    DATA error_message TYPE string.

    deep_busi_data    =    VALUE #(
                       sales_order_type            = 'OR'
                       sales_organization          = '1010'
                       distribution_channel        = '10'
                       organization_division       = '00'
                       sold_to_party               = '10100001'
                       purchase_order_by_customer  = 'SalesOrder Simulation'
                       to_item = VALUE #( (
                          sales_order_item = '1'
                          material = 'TG11' "'TG122'
                          requested_quantity = '5'
                          ) )
                       ).


    DATA(response) = simulatesalesorder(
                       EXPORTING
                         i_salesorderdata = deep_busi_data
                       IMPORTING
                         r_error_message  = error_message
                     ).

 

Where the type is a deep structure as follows:

 TYPES:
      "! <p class="shorttext synchronized">A_SalesOrderSimulationType</p>
      BEGIN OF tys_a_sales_order_simulation_t,
        "! <em>Key property</em> SalesOrder
        sales_order                TYPE c LENGTH 10,
        "! SalesOrderType
        sales_order_type           TYPE c LENGTH 4,
        "! SalesOrganization
        sales_organization         TYPE c LENGTH 4,
        "! DistributionChannel
      ....
        customer_payment_terms     TYPE c LENGTH 4,
        "! PaymentMethod
        payment_method             TYPE c LENGTH 1,

        to_item                    TYPE tyt_a_sales_order_item_simul_2,

      END OF tys_a_sales_order_simulation_t,
      "! <p class="shorttext synchronized">List of A_SalesOrderSimulationType</p>
      tyt_a_sales_order_simulation_t TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF tys_a_sales_order_simulation_t WITH DEFAULT KEY.

entry.title: sap b1 bas different language settings
entry.content:
Hello,

Today we have an issue with bas access. The language settings stablished for the company is "Spanish (Spain)" and it is ok when you access by desktop client. When you access by bas the language change to "English (United States)".

Anybody knows why is this change and how to fix it?

Kind regards,

Esti.

entry.title: Re: pcr payroll
entry.content: thankyou.. on what basis do we decide of we need one pcr or two? only one wagetype should be in one pcr?

entry.title: Re: Post checks after RKS(Rolling Kernel Switch).
entry.content: Hi, could you share the kernel release and sp level from and to?

entry.title: Guidance on Migrating SMP Apps to SAP Mobile Services on BTP
entry.content:
We are planning to migrate our existing SMP (SAP Mobile Platform) apps, which include functionalities for barcode printing, reactive and planned maintenance, approvals, and reporting, to SAP Mobile Services on SAP BTP. The apps currently use solutions like SAP Rounds Manager, SAP CRM Service Manager, SAP Work Manager, and custom UI5 apps.

Could the community share insights or best practices for:

  1. Migrating SMP apps to SAP Mobile Services while maintaining key functionalities.
  2. Leveraging SAP BTP services to enhance user experience and reduce customizations?
  3. Managing device compatibility and barcode scanning requirements on the new platform?
  4. Strategies for seamless integration of existing customizations into the BTP framework?

Any recommendations or documentation links to guide this transition would be highly appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: Using the Employee Central Assignment ID as Personnel Number (PERNR) in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently implementing S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (S4C) and Successfactors Employee Central (SF). The automatic replication of employees from SF to S4C is part of this.

We would like to have the personnel number of a Worker in S4C (Work Agreement field Personnel Number) to be the same as the number in SF, the SF Assignment ID / User ID field.

According to note DIGITS this should be possible, because the prerequisites are fulfilled:

* We have not yet activated the employee replication from SF to S4C for any SF and S4 system.

* And we have activated the Assignment ID in SF.

But I wonder if it will remain possible to create Workers also manually after the feature to copy the personnel number from SF is activated. Is this still possible?

The situation in our company is that we have both internal employees and external (contingent) workers.

We are a recruitment and secondment agency for SAP consultants hiring external workers on an individual basis for long-term assignments at customers. So these people are no employees of our company but only workers which we hire and rehire to customers through S4C Professional Services customer projects and purchase orders. They should not be part of Successfactors.

I know that Successfactors also has functionality to define contingent employees but for these people this brings unnecessary additional license costs. We do not need any SF functionality for these people. They only have to enter their working hours in the S4C timesheet weekly.

So the question is, can we activate the assignment ID replication from SF to S4C and still create external workers manually directly in S4C without running into problems?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Using the Employee Central Assignment ID as Personnel...
entry.content:
For the First question,

The Employee Central Assignment Id cannot be equivalent to the Personnel number in S/4HANA. This functionality is not valid from this latest release.

For the second question,

Even if you are creating the Employee via any integration, it will still be possible to create the contingent worker manually via the Manage Workforce application.

 

Thanks and Regards,
Moumita.

entry.title: Re: ASA 17.0.10: Question about calling external web serv...
entry.content:
Where do the numbers next to "boundary" come from ?

I understand correctly that I will have to recode binary data into BASE64 (Function BASE64_ENCODE) ?

P.S. I honestly thought that if you pass long binary data to a web function (in my example WebTest2Run), the recoding will be done automatically, as well as adding the necessary parts of the request header and body. But judging by your answer I was wrong.

entry.title: Re: SAP Multibank Connectivity Integration: BASIS Perspective
entry.content:
Thanks for the information.

Is the same process If we want to use the option of pickup file?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Connection SAP SEM BCS to SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi community, 

I am currently trying to connect a SAP SCM BCS Business Consolidation (SEM BCS)  to SAP Datasphere
Is this possible analogue to a BW System? Which connector can I use and are there any critical prerequisits I need to consider?
In https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-datasphere-sap-bw-bridge-overview-and-technical-deep-dive/ba-p/13494915 is just mentioned, that the SAP BW Bridge is not an option. 

thank you in advance,

entry.title: Re: ASA 17.0.10: Question about calling external web serv...
entry.content: you can use whatever you want for the boundary string, see https://www.w3.org/Protocols/rfc1341/7_2_Multipart.html

entry.title: Where can I start learning the basic configuration settings for billing documents in SAP S/4HANA?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Configuring Billing in SAP S/4HANA Sales learning journey.

Overview
In this learning journey, you can learn the basic configuration settings for billing documents in SAP S/4HANA. Different variants and ways of creating billing documents are also discussed. As well as special processes like working with down payments and installment payments.

Learning objectives
This learning journey will prepare you to:

  • Configure organizational units for billing
  • Configure billing types
  • Use special billing types
  • Configure the data flow for billing
  • Create billing documents in various ways
  • Configure account determination
  • Configure the interface between Sales and Distribution and Financial Accounting

Prerequisites

  • Applying SAP S/4HANA Sales

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS VIEW TO FETCH SUM OF QTY FROM MSEG TABLE FOR...
entry.content:
Hi @govardan_raj,

Running in SE16 you are automatic restricted to current client you logged in. Your CDS doesn't expose the mandt and maybe that is the difference you are facing. Add it and try again.

Regards, Fernando Da Rós

entry.title: list report search on composite entity
entry.content:
I have two CDS entities A and B. B is an composition and has an Attribute BNAME.

In a list report-app  i want to filter the result of A by BNAME (All A which have a certain BNAME) and then the rest should be as usual: Navigate to ObjectPage of A and display and edit. 

The challenge is to get the filter attribute into entity A and the content of BNAME into a result column  to be style guide conform.

STRING_AGG could have been an option, but ist not supported in my HANA 2022-System.

How do you archieve such a search over compositions ?

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Sales training and certification requirem...
entry.content:
Hi @tchernikov 
Currently sample questions are only available in English, but in the exam you can use instant translate to translate the questions into German.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Leading zeros in product master

entry.title: Re: Are there any alternatives to ERP Prep for SAP certificate training?
entry.content:
Hi @Hamzah1
Please share the certification code and/or the name of the exam, so we can help to guide you to recommended "how to prepare"  documents. 
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: SAP Green Ledger Is Out Now
entry.content:
SAP is committed to reduce its net carbon emissions by 2030.  

Sustainability is one of the top-of-mind topics in today’s world. Embark with us on the journey towards a more sustainable future with the SAP Green Ledger! We’re happy to announce the General Availability (GA) and first public release of the SAP Green Ledger solution. 

The SAP Green Ledger is hosted on the SAP Business Technology Platform and combines your financial accounting with GHG emissions quantities for your business. By applying the financial principles of double-entry accounting to carbon costs, it provides a clear and quantifiable understanding of the carbon impact, from provisioning to delivery. It supports you in defining targeted emissions reduction actions to be taken at specific business units, cost centers, departments, locations, profit centers, or segments. It also provides you with auditable reports regarding sustainability standards and regulations. 

Let’s take a closer look at our vision with this video.

 

 

 

 

 

 

The SAP Green Ledger solution comes with the following key capacities: 

Support for integration with other systems 

The broad benefits of this solution come in part from its ability to integrate with other systems. Among them are the following: 

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, and SAP S/4HANA 
  • SAP Sustainability Footprint Management (this is optional, but it facilitates importing carbon data into SAP Green Ledger) 
  • SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud (this is optional, but it allows for better reporting and analysing of carbon data) 

Replication of corporate financial master data 

You can import corporate master data from connected business systems like SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, thus aligning carbon accounting with the global corporate financial framework. 

Carbon data collection and posting 

SAP Green Ledger is the central hub for the accounting of greenhouse gas emissions data incurred by a company through its activities or its purchased goods and services. You can import this data seamlessly from SAP Sustainability Footprint Management import it from external sources by uploading spreadsheets, or enter it manually, and later post it to the journal at the entity level. 

Carbon data export to group reporting 

You can export carbon data from SAP Green Ledger to SAP Group Reporting Data Collection. From there, your data is mapped and imported to group reporting inSAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. The data is consolidated with financial data for group reporting and analysis. 

Allocation management 

You can allocate posted carbon quantities to the specific cost centers, profit centers, or accounts responsible for those emissions. This lets you quantify the global carbon and financial cost for specific departments, functional areas, locations, profit centers, segments, or units in your company. 

Visualization and reporting 

Thanks to SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud, you can visualize the data in multiple ways and create audit-quality reports to support data-driven decision makin This integration allows you to analyse your carbon data in comparison to your financial data. It allows for analytics on financial dimension in relation to financial figures, such as revenues, margins, or income. 

Additionally, you can create internal reports and use them to further analyse your carbon data within SAP Green Ledger. 

GHG Emission Planning 

You can use your carbon data to provide actuals for GHG emission planning Based on these actuals emissions and their financial impact can be planned and simulated for future fiscal periods. For more information, see Blog Post: Driving Corporate Sustainability. 

For more information regarding features and functions, see the Feature Scope Description. 

SAP Green Ledger is your ticket towards more sustainability. Why don’t you join us on our sustainability journey? Learn more about SAP Green Ledger today!

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Asset Management – Output Management using Work Packs
entry.content: Great blog @VikasGupta_ASM . Keep those good stuffs coming 👍

entry.title: Re: Not able to purchase one/six attempt for SAP certification exam for India region From SAP Traini
entry.content: As you already found out by yourself (if you have searched), the question has been asked ten times these last few days, there should be an answer from SAP soon in this thread: https://community.sap.com/t5/questions-about-sap-websites/not-able-to-purchase-one-attempt-for-sap-certification-exam-for-india/qaq-p/13961972/comment-id/58168#M58168

entry.title: Re: /SCWM/RACC_IMP_ERP_UI - Time out Dump
entry.content:
Hi Omar,

as stated in my previous reply - regarding the number range(s) for orders please check with your functional consultants in PE, PM, CO,... streams - they can tell you the used order categories with used order types and hopefully distinct number ranges to limit the amount of numbers.

Similar for cost center and WBS elements, as they should have somehow implemented a logic to destinct between different countries, areas and so on...

Regarding the timeout - there is system paramter "rdisp/max_wprun_time" for maximum runtime for online processes - check with your basis team the actual value. Nevertheless you should run this program in batch mode/background with different variants for your different number ranges, as background jobs does not run into time out.

You won't find any change pointers - this is a very simple program in EWM to call the AAC determination in ERP system based on account category and number range table:

CALL FUNCTION '/SPE/AAC_DETERMINATION' DESTINATION lv_rfcdest

Kind regards,

Christian

entry.title: Re: Bidirectional integration between SAP SuccessFactors & Azure Active Directory in Microsoft Azure
entry.content:
@vslavova1 
Please see attached picture, edit attribute mapping and check Advanced Options and choose Edit SuccessFactors Attributes and make sure manager is Reference not string.

entry.title: Re: How to write read statement inside loop table based on index using 7.4+ syntax
entry.content:
In fact, the only obsolete part in your code is PERFORM (obsolete since 2010), the rest of your code is perfectly valid. You should use ABAP Objects (method instead of subroutine).

Anyway, rewriting that code is just a waste of time, except just exercising.

entry.title: Customer Return Invoice Request with status With Conflict
entry.content:
The Customer Return Invoice Request with status With Conflict

  1. Go to Customer Invoicing - Invoice Requests 
  2. Select Customer Return Invoice Request
  3. The document is with status With Conflict  
  4. Click on Check button 

Conflict in item 10; cancellation requested but invoice already exists

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Customer Return Invoice Request with status With Conf...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

This issue usually happens when the relevant Credit Memo is Released, but the corresponding Customer Return and Inbound Delivery are with Cancelled status. 

Since all the documents are already cancelled the Credit memo should also be cancelled. Due to this system is showing the status of invoice request as With Conflict  and error details "Conflict in item 10; cancellation requested but invoice already exists". 

Regards,

Arjun

entry.title: SAP Router (seclogin: Can't add credentials)
How to Handle Dimension Display Options (ID, Description, ID + Description) in R-Scripting
entry.content:
Hello,

I am using R Visualizations in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) and would like to dynamically control how dimension values are displayed on the x-axis based on their Display Options:

  1. ID Only
  2. Description Only
  3. ID and Description

In standard SAC charts, this behavior is handled by setting the display option for the dimension. However, I am not sure how to replicate this functionality in an R Visualization.

For example:

  • Dimension ID: A, B, C
  • Dimension Description: Alpha, Beta, Gamma

I want to visualize these in R with the following behaviors:

  1. X-axis shows ID only (A, B, C).
  2. X-axis shows Description only (Alpha, Beta, Gamma).
  3. X-axis shows both ID and Description combined (A - Alpha, B - Beta, C - Gamma).

Could anyone guide me on how to implement this using R-scripting in SAC? Specifically, how do I map or transform the dimension values to achieve this flexibility in R?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP Practice
entry.content:
Hi @Muhammad_Zain 
Please browse our Practice Systems site where you find a list of our current offerings.
I also recommend our Practice systems support site where you find details on how to access

Please also check our C_TS4FI SAP Certified Associate - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, Financial Accounting where we provide the list of topics that may be covered within this SAP Certification and the courses that touches on these topics. Its accuracy does not constitute a legitimate claim. SAP reserves the right to update the exam content (topics, items, weighting) at any time  and sample questions.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: SAP message error VL312 during an inbound delivery cr...

Hi

 

I return to standard EL and check the form TVAK_SELECT and it seems ok. It's getting the DL order type

Other suggestion what could be from SAP behaviour?

entry.title: Group Reporting: Flexible upload with LC key same as GC key
entry.content:
Hello,

We are implementing Group Reporting Public Cloud version and are targeting to upload amounts in Local Currency and Global Currency. 

As per OSS note 3463696, when Local Currency = Global Currency in a consolidation unit, global currency amount gets overwritten with local currency amount. This is an existing scenario in our system, since Currency translation is happening in a separate S/4 HANA on prem system.

Is there a workaround for this situation so we can use flexible upload functionality? or any alternative to Flexible upload functionality?

Thanks.

entry.title: Output parameter determination for PO with old version
entry.content:
Hi team

Is it possible to create a new version of  PO output form to allow old versions to be saved and keep track of the history.

System is updating al output forms with recent saved changes.

Is it possible to see all version of PO in output form (Messages). like each line for each previous modification?

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors People Analytics (Stories): How to create change report (current vs previous valu
entry.content:
Thanks @StephanieBM01 

Just curious to know if this requirement is possible. Any thoughts from your end would be helpful. I am looking to generate a report for all employees in the company if they have a change in Job code. 

Additionally, the report should show the latest Job Code change only. For example, if I have 3 job changes in the last 3 years, the report should give me one line item with the latest record of Job code change (with current and previous values).

Right now, I am able to get all the Job code changes for all employees. But I am stuck at reporting only the latest record

Is there any specific time filters or a workaround which I can use?

entry.title: CCV2 2211 deployment faills with the e erro- Component has failing instances (CrashLoopBackOff)
entry.content:
Here is  brief summary.

SAP version - 2211.29

Problem-

Unable to do deployment in ccv2. error"{"envCode":"d4","subCode":"40fae3520bff4d9da7e5a2b69c0f0b19","errorMsg":"Component has failing instances (CrashLoopBackOff).","stepCode":"dm_0200js","buildName":"migration_1","buildCode":"20241212.2","customerReleaseBuildVersion":"2211.29-2211azuresdk12-20241121-020431-20241212.2-aa47277-migration_1"}"

The same error occurs when every deployment, irrespective of any build. Its happening from a while now.

Its not code error rather seems Platform infra error.

logs-Nothing much in logs. the same error"{"envCode":"d4","subCode":"40fae3520bff4d9da7e5a2b69c0f0b19","errorMsg":"Component has failing instances (CrashLoopBackOff).","stepCode":"dm_0200js","buildName":"migration_1","buildCode":"20241212.2","customerReleaseBuildVersion":"2211.29-2211azuresdk12-20241121-020431-20241212.2-aa47277-migration_1"}

Appreciated any info on solution pointing on this issue.

#CCV2 deployment

#composable storefront

#crashback loop error

 SAP Commerce 

Thanks 

Rakesh

entry.title: Re: how to settlement by period in cj88
entry.content: You must always settle 100%. As explained earlier in my response, you cannot settle 90% in one period and the remaining 10% in another period.

entry.title: Re: SAP Practice

As per @SAP  Anyone with an SAP Learning Hub subscription can enroll for hands-on practice systems to gain practical knowledge and experiment with SAP solutions. Therefore it essential to have SAP Learning Hub.

Thanks
@harvind

entry.title: Relaxed Flow not working in Work Center POD
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am using production order and order-specific-routing with Relaxed flow as true. 

When i am trying to start the second operation (instead of first), it says not possible. Can you please suggest why it is not possible? As per my understanding, if we set relaxed flow as true, it should start and complete the operations parallelly. 

Hope to get some clarity on this. 

Thanks,

Nikhil Gupta

 

SAP Digital Manufacturing

entry.title: Re: Regarding updating BLOB in BTP Cloud Hana DB via CAPM...
entry.content:
Hi Viwek,

You need to follow the OData streaming choreography, first you need to create the surrounding instance, then use `PUT` to stream in the large binary. Here you can find more details:
https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/providing-services#creating-a-media-resource

 

Best regards,
David

entry.title: How to link to another section within same blog
entry.content:
Hi,

I am writing a blog and would like to add a link in the blog to another section within same blog post. 

I have already tried How to Add an Anchor Link to Jump to a Specific Part of a Page via HTML mode, it gives me an error and removes the ID created against the section header. 

Looking forward for a response.

thanks

entry.title: Santa builds process to distribute Christmas presents
entry.content:
No one would deny that Santa has a complex process to give out presents for Christmas. 

But several key new SAP Build Process Automation features has enabled Santa to automate the process using a true Fusion Team of reindeer, elves, and his wife. Among the features:

  • Scheduled triggers
  • Script task
  • Custom variables
  • Subprocesses
  • Go to task

And the process can actually teach us some of the capabilities of SAP Build Process Automation.

Scheduled Triggers

Probably the most obvious feature to help Santa is the scheduled trigger for regular processes. We could rely on one of the elves to send an API call, but the scheduled trigger is much more reliable.

Action and Data Type to Get Children 

The process uses an action to retrieves a list of children.

We first created a data type to represent a child (name string and a Boolean on whether they were nice or naughty).

Then we created custom variables, one to hold the full list of children, and another to hold the current child in our iteration.

Then we run an action to get the children.

Script Task and GoTo for Iterating Children

Now we create a script task to move the last child into the current child variable, and to remove that child from the full list.

And finally we create an iteration sequence by a Go To back to the start, where we have a condition to see if the list has more children, and 

Subprocesses

We create subprocesses like "Prepare Reindeer and Sled" since we are likely to need to do that during the year, and we create subprocesses like "Deliver via Chimney" in order to simplify and isolate our logic.

Obvious, in a more realistic case we would have created additional logic to review all the actions of a child to determine if they were nice or naughty, as Santa "sees you when you're sleepin'" and "knows when you're awake", and likely is aware of all actions of a children, so we might use a Decision to make that determination.

And we might create an automation to deal with the complexity of building the toys, handling emails in Outlook from kids wanting presents, and looking for sales on toys on the web.

entry.title: Re: How to write read statement inside loop table based on index using 7.4+ syntax
entry.content: Thank you. This is good

entry.title: Re: How to write read statement inside loop table based on index using 7.4+ syntax

entry.title: Re: pcr payroll
entry.content:
By mistake i close the thread apologies and coming to your query 

1. Experience Teaches us 2. you need values of one wage type to be queried for the output of another wage type hence results should exists in the output table first then only we can go ahead with the second condition

entry.title: Re: SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI Now Available
entry.content:
Hi Uday Kumar,

Yes, if you are looking for an alternative to using Kerberos for SSO then the SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI can offer you such a solution. Besides Kerberos support, the solution also offers SSO based on X.509 certificates issued by the Secure Login Service. You will find more detailed information on our topic page here in SAP Community. 

The SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI requires a separate license (cloud subscription). For pricing details, please contact your SAP Account Executive or have a look at SAP Discovery Center. 

Best regards,

Martina

entry.title: Re: How to build SOAP service in SAP Cloud Integration, Part 1
entry.content:
@jirifridrich hello, I've managed to call SOAP service, which is calling BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST as a web service. However, I got the problem which is the transaction is not being committed. Somehow might need to call BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT.
any suggestion how to do it?

Thank you
Regards,
Josua

entry.title: Re: Stock room management vs Basic EWM vs EWM
entry.content:
Hi 

Check this URL, It will required information but you need to go through it 

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-members/introducing-warehousing-concept-in-sap-s-4-hana-supply-chain-execution/ba-p/13950806

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Overall timeout/deadline for CPI iflow
entry.content:
Hello.

I have a requirement to set an overall timeout or deadline for an integration flow that it is expected to run for a long time until a required entry is found in a datastore. The entry is expected at certain time of the day but it can be delayed for several reasons. If the deadline is reached, the processing has to stop and the message has to end in error.

Has anyone faced a similar challenge? If so, how can this be achieved?

I searched thoughout the community but haven't found anything useful. Maybe my searching criteria was poor.

I thought about encapsulating the main functionality in a looping local process, with a groovy that waits a little time, lets say 30 seconds, before let a datastore-get, look for the entry; then set the looping process max iterations dynamically with a property that has the calculation 'deadline-time-in-seconds' divided by 'waiting-time-by-the-groovy' (for example, if the dealine is 1 hour, then the property would be 3600/30 = 120 iterations) and let the loop end in error if the max iterations is reached. The condition expression would be initially false and switched to true if the entry is found in the datastore. Would this be okay?

 

Thanks in advance for any insight on this matter.

Thanks

entry.title: How to Add or Enable Extension Fields in Adobe LiveCycle Designer?
entry.content:
Extension fields are already added in Form Template via Adaptation. But when editing the form template via Adobe LiveCycle Designer, the extension fields in Adobe LiveCycle Designer are not available.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to Add or Enable Extension Fields in Adobe LiveCy...
entry.content:
You need to connect the main schema to data view.

Below are the steps to follow:

  1. Open .xdp file (template) in Adobe Livecycle designer and go to Data view.
  2. Right click on ‘Data connection’ and select ‘Connection properties’ 
  3. Click Next & Ok.
  4. In this screen, browse and select the MainSchema.xsd
  5. Click ‘Finish’

Once the connection is updated, you should be able to bind the fields respectively.

You can also refer to KBA: https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2545812

entry.title: SAP Cloud Applications Studio - is it possible to fetch, as a formula, the account that is related
entry.content:
I need to show, as a static field the Account that is related to the contact. Can i somehow fetch that field directly from the BO Browser/Data Model, if i am starting from the Contact level?
The field i am trying to fetch is in the screenshot that is attached.

 

Thank you!

entry.title: S_ALR_87011964 display ANLA-GDGRP and ANLB-NDJAR
entry.content:
Dear All,
Using transaction S_ALR_87011964 , I am trying to display ANLA-GDGRP, which is an Evaluation Group, and ANLB-NDJAR (UseLife of the assets). Those fields where available in ECC but I can't find them in the backend of S4 On Premise.
Is there a way I could obtain them ?  Maybe a Fiori app that provides information as S_ALR_87011964 but also the two fields I need ?

Kind regards

entry.content: Will this works in SAP Data Intelligence Cloud also?

entry.title: Re: Story Reports not working after Importing from PROD
entry.content:
Hi Dipti,

What are the tables used in your Query?

entry.title: Setting Default Payment Terms for New Accounts
entry.content:
Hello Dear Community , is it possible to set a default value for payment terms when creating a new account? When an employee creates a new account in the system, we would like the system to display a default payment term value. This will allow sales managers to modify it later if needed.

Could you please help us with this?

entry.title: Special stock returns
entry.content:
Hello All,

I use configured material.

I do not want my return order type material to be valued at the standard price.

Also, can the return of the sold product be withdrawn from the sold order?

Since the material is tracked in special stock, if this process can be done, what is the calculating cost?

I am waiting for your help

entry.title: Re: In app Work Center Capacity Application Jobs : "Backg...
entry.content:
Hello @Emeric 

Work Center Application Jobs is an application to track the jobs scheduled from the Mass Maintenance of Work Center Capacities app.

please check below linkage for detail information https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/index.html#/detail/Apps('F5939')/S33

Parameter-Value: SAP_PP_MASS_CHG_WRKCTR

Best Regards

Dave

entry.title: Re: Insert text type and content in notes tab in Edit Fre...
entry.content: Hi @Rohit_Mahajan,

entry.title: Re: Issue while trying SAP BTP, Kyma runtime mission
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for reaching out. 

To see Integration > Applications in your Kyma dashboard, you must first enable the Application Connector module. It is mentioned as a prerequisite. I also prepared the updated version of the mission tutorials with more detailed instructions on adding a module in Kyma. The updated version is now under review. I'll let you know as soon as it is published.
In the meantime, you can try following the Add and Delete a Kyma module tutorial to add all the modules necessary to complete the mission.
Let me know if it helps.

Best regards,

Grego

entry.title: Re: Insert text type and content in notes tab in Edit Fre...
entry.content:
Hi @Rohit_Mahajan, thank you for your reply. I am doing the same as you suggested. But still the text is not getting inserted at the FU level. I have referred to the below code. Please let me know how to resolve the issue.

REPORT ztest.
PARAMETERS:
  tor_id TYPE /scmtms/tor_id OBLIGATORY,
  schema TYPE /bobf/txc_text_schema_id OBLIGATORY,
  type   TYPE /bobf/txc_text_type OBLIGATORY,
  text   TYPE string OBLIGATORY LOWER CASE.


DATA:
  srv    TYPE REF TO /bobf/if_tra_service_manager,
  keys   TYPE /bobf/t_frw_key,
  failed TYPE /bobf/t_frw_key,
  msg    TYPE REF TO /bobf/if_frw_message,
  tra    TYPE REF TO /bobf/if_tra_transaction_mgr.

START-OF-SELECTION.

  srv = /bobf/cl_tra_serv_mgr_factory=>get_service_manager( /scmtms/if_tor_c=>sc_bo_key ).

  srv->convert_altern_key(
  EXPORTING
    iv_node_key = /scmtms/if_tor_c=>sc_node-root
    iv_altkey_key = /scmtms/if_tor_c=>sc_alternative_key-root-tor_id
    it_key = VALUE /scmtms/t_tor_id( ( tor_id ) )
  IMPORTING
    et_key = keys
  ).

  msg = /bobf/cl_frw_message_factory=>create_container( ).

  CALL METHOD /scmtms/cl_txc_helper=>create
    EXPORTING
      iv_text_schema_id = schema
      iv_text_type      = type
      iv_host_node_key  = /scmtms/if_tor_c=>sc_node-root
      iv_host_bo_key    = /scmtms/if_tor_c=>sc_bo_key
      iv_host_inst_key  = keys[ 1 ]-key
      iv_text_content   = text
    IMPORTING
      eo_message        = msg
      et_failed_key     = failed.

  tra = /bobf/cl_tra_trans_mgr_factory=>get_transaction_manager( ).

  tra->save( ).
